Override.entitydescription.safewallhangingmetalcr: A container for storing items that can be quickly placed on the wall, waterproof and fireproof. Now improved, it is cheaper and larger.
Override.entitydescription.Verticalmissilelaunche: Terra Group's Vertical Launch System，compatible:‖color:gui.orange‖GPS-guided missile，‖end‖\n\n We strongly advise against replacing this weapon on ships with narrow gun rooms in the game, as its loader is relatively high and the room may be too narrow to interact with it. We recommend completing the editing in advance in the editor.
Override.entitydescription.Missileloadingchamber: The loading device for the vertical launch system should be placed vertically below the launcher.
Override.entitydescription.jammingBombsDefenseArt: You can launch specially designed chaff to interfere with the enemy's missile targeting accuracy. You need to quickly complete evasive maneuvers while deploying the chaff. Please adjust the launch angle yourself. It is recommended to use a trigger rod for activation.
Override.entitydescription.jammingBombsCloseDefen: Interference grenade launcher system with accompanying loading device

It can launch specially designed chaff to interfere with the targeting accuracy of enemy missiles. It requires rapid evasive maneuvers while deploying the chaff. It also has the effect of a sonar decoy, capable of diverting the attention of submarines.
Override.entitydescription.Semiactiveguidancemiss: Guided by the group's orbiting satellite around Europa, obtain the launch permit, enter the turret view, place the mouse on the target location, and press the left button to lock on. You can move the mouse to adjust the landing point, but please do not move the mouse back to the ship.\n‖color:gui.orange‖(Maximum number of leads：1，Fuse type: Explodes upon reaching target location/impact fuse, overload capacity: strong, can it perform beyond-visual-range active strikes: no)‖end‖
Override.entitydescription.antishipMissile_Enemy: Player teams, please do not equip your ships with this missile, as it can be interfered with by decoy missiles.\n‖color:gui.orange‖(Maximum number of targets that can be guided: 1, Fuse type: Impact fuse, Overload capacity: High, Can it perform beyond-visual-range active strikes: Yes)‖end‖
Override.entitydescription.TL_HydroponicTank: The Group's smart hydroponic box continuously produces corresponding fruits after connecting to power and placing fruits inside. ‖color:gui.orange‖Compatible with TeraDeepOcean. ‖end‖ Please ensure it is plugged in; otherwise, the timer mechanism will not activate.
Override.entitydescription.he-kegempty: An empty bucket can be placed in the sea to collect seawater.

infotexts.entitydescription.CloseDefenseArtillery: High-speed rotary close-range cannon, capable of firing tons of bullets, vent your anger on the creatures of Europa.
infotexts.entityname.CloseDefenseArtillery_Atuo: Fully automatic rapid-fire close-in weapon system
infotexts.entitydescription.CloseDefenseArtillery_: The rapid-fire close-in weapon system is equipped with a specially designed AI chip that can independently target and engage threats. To reduce ammunition costs, its firing rate is slightly slower than the manual version.
Loader for two close-in weapon systems
The basic ammunition of the close-range artillery battery has impressive firepower, with a large amount of inexpensive ammunition stored inside for indiscriminate firing.
infotexts.entityname.CloseDefenseArtillery_routine: Close-in weapon system upgrade ammunition box
infotexts.entitydescription.CloseDefenseArtillery_: The ammunition, upgraded from conventional ammunition, incorporates harder materials to improve armor penetration and is equipped with a micro-explosive warhead. However, due to the increased size of the projectile, the ammunition capacity has been reduced and the rate of fire has decreased.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Close-range defense guns, rapid-fire guns, and electromagnetic guns‖end‖All compatible

The bullet casing has been improved, resulting in extremely stable ballistics and accuracy, but at the expense of some damage. This has increased bullet velocity and penetration power.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Close-range defense guns, rapid-fire guns, and electromagnetic guns‖end‖All compatible
Wide-area scatter bombs with armor-piercing explosive warheads, effective against group targets, capable of penetrating invincible ship hulls (3 layers).
infotexts.entityname.CloseDefenseArtillery_explosi: Close-range anti-armor fragmentation explosive ammunition box (close-range detonation)
infotexts.entitydescription.CloseDefenseArtillery_: Explosive shells equipped with proximity fuses (2M) are heavier and bulkier, fly slower, but are more accurate, and can form a terrifying fire network in front of large numbers of enemies.

A special type of electromagnetic bomb that produces extremely destructive electrolysis upon explosion, used to disable enemy electronic equipment or turrets. It can penetrate invincible ship hulls (3 layers).\n‖color:gui.orange‖Close-range defense guns, rapid-fire guns, and electromagnetic guns‖end‖All compatible

The group applied the manufacturing principle of fragmentation shells to the close-in weapon system in a rather crude manner, but the drawbacks were also obvious, resulting in a significant decline in compatibility and turret performance.
infotexts.entitydescription.Bismarck_Old: The outdated giant cannon, once the pride of the Earth fleet, might be more effective against the creatures of Europa than advanced water pipes?\n‖color:gui.orange‖Long press to fire repeatedly, allowing you to launch railgun shells.‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.380MMMAINGUN: The outdated giant cannon, once the pride of the Earth fleet, might be more effective against the creatures of Europa than advanced water pipes?？\n‖color:gui.orange‖Long press to fire repeatedly, allowing you to launch railgun shells.‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.HeavyArtilleryShellMou: Ammunition rack for 380 mm and 460 mm shells
infotexts.entitydescription.380MMAmmo_Propellant: 380MM Special propellant for naval gun shells
infotexts.entitydescription.380MMAmmo_Solid: Extremely inexpensive solid cannonballs that rely solely on kinetic energy to cause damage.
infotexts.entitydescription.380MMAmmo_HE: The lethality of high-explosive shells is achieved through gas expansion and fragmentation, and they are unable to penetrate the heavy armor of enemy ships.
infotexts.entitydescription.380MMAmmo_AP: Relying on the hardness of the warhead and its own weight to crash into enemy ships, then exploding inside to cause damage.
infotexts.entitydescription.380MMAmmo_SAP: A type of ammunition that combines armor-piercing and high-explosive capabilities, capable of effectively penetrating enemy ship armor and causing significant damage.
infotexts.entitydescription.380MMAmmo_Light: When fired, the illumination flare splits into several illumination cores during flight, illuminating the surrounding area.
infotexts.entitydescription.460mm: The Earth Fleet's former glory in caliber warfare (cannot be boarded, for use by official Terra ships only)
infotexts.entitydescription.460MMAmmo: The Earth Fleet's former glory in caliber warfare is now nothing more than a pile of scrap metal.
infotexts.entitydescription.Con_depthchargetube: Direction-changeable deep-water bomb launcher\n‖color:gui.orange‖Railgun shells can be deployed.‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.LaserCloseSystem: The heavy laser defense turrets widely deployed on the Group's flagship warships require immense power consumption for charging. Two types of ammunition are available: multi-scatter rounds provide wide-area coverage, ideal for group engagements; while focused-energy rounds concentrate laser beams to effortlessly penetrate heavily armored targets.
infotexts.entityname.LaserCloseSystem_Auto: Fully Automated Heavy-Duty Laser Defense System
infotexts.entitydescription.LaserCloseSystem_Auto: The integrated search-and-strike module has been upgraded to automatically identify targets and engage them, but this comes at a higher cost and requires increased power consumption to support its operation.
infotexts.entitydescription.LaserCloseSystem_Multi: The internal structure employs an extremely complex prism arrangement, maximizing the laser's scattering angle but resulting in reduced penetration and ultimate damage.
infotexts.entitydescription.LaserCloseSystem_Heavy: Using a specially designed prism, all lasers converge and erupt outward—a brutally efficient method against heavily armored targets. Any armor comes into contact with the laser beam and instantly melts away. ‖color:gui.orange‖Features a headshot execution function‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_WhitePhoenix: White Phoenix is steady and solemn, its barrel forged like white feathers. Though its rate of fire is slow, the muzzle's still flame and heavy recoil imbue each shot with decisive intent. ‖color:gui.blue‖Twin Design · Phoenix and Kite White Phoenix symbolizes “the purity of wind,” while Purple Kite embodies “the agility of shadow.” \nComplementing each other, they are known as “Bright Wings and Dark Feathers.”‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.WhitePhoenix_magazine: Each pull of the trigger on the White Phoenix pistol feels like a plummeting strike from the heavens. Its unique “wind ridge penetration structure” grants the bullet astonishing penetrating power, capable of effortlessly shattering armor and cover.
infotexts.entitydescription.HX_PurpleKite: The Purple Kite is agile and elusive, featuring a deep purple gradient shell with lightweight internal materials. This design delivers exceptional rapid-fire responsiveness, making it exceptionally nimble in close-to-medium range combat. ‖color:gui.blue‖Twin Design · Phoenix and Kite The White Phoenix symbolizes “the purity of wind,” while the Purple Kite embodies “the agility of shadow.” \nComplementing each other, they are known as “Bright Wings and Dark Feathers.”‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.PurpleKite_magazine: The Purple Kite pistol's bullets deal relatively low damage per shot, but it excels in rapid fire rate, strong handling, and excellent penetration, making it exceptionally agile in close-to-medium range combat.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_Baikal: ‖color:gui.red‖-贝加尔的蓝冰下，冰封的生命诗-‖end‖\n A top-secret experimental weapon exhibiting extreme instability, requiring either a ‖color:gui.orange‖Baikal Blue Ice Energy Capacitor‖end‖ for power supply or a single bullet to be loaded. When a bullet is loaded, electromagnetic force propels it at high velocity; alternatively, it can fire directly using laser technology. \n - Comes with one capacitor included.-
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_Baikal_Battery: Internal injection of concentrated high-voltage electricity; single-use only. Recharge at the printer after use.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_AR57: Tera recovered one of the prototype weapon blueprints from the abandoned military blockade outpost of the Alliance, reverse-engineered and modified it, and ultimately produced a standard-issue submachine carbine.
infotexts.entitydescription.AR57_magazine: Magazine for AR57\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: Weak Damage: Medium-high Ammo capacity: 50‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_TL14: Terra Group standard equipment is widely favored by mercenaries thanks to its outstanding precision and design, and is suitable for a variety of scenarios.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_TL14_Pro: TL-14An improved version of the standard assault rifle, featuring additional expansion slots for mounting accessories and addressing design flaws in the previous model, it has also become more aggressive.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Supported accessories: Vertical grip, lightweight extended barrel‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL14_magazine: Designed for the TL-14 magazine, but can also be used with the TL-15 due to its excellent compatibility.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: Weak Damage: Medium-high Ammo capacity: 40‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_TL15: Yes, we are a little tired of the old TL-14, even though its performance is impeccable. The group has developed an improved model at just the right time. Who doesn't love a new toy?\n‖color:gui.orange‖Supported accessories: Vertical grip, heavy-duty extended barrel‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_TL15_Pro: In its final iteration on TL-15, this weapon has become the pinnacle of the Terra series. When its bullets rain down on the enemy's face, it becomes clear why the corporation has locked down this blueprint.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Supported accessories: Vertical grip, Heavy-duty extended barrel, Gun chip ‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL15_magazine: Designed for the TL-15 magazine\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: High Damage: High Ammo Capacity: 55‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_TL13: The group's basic standard equipment is easy to use and manufacture, and can be quickly mastered even without combat experience.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_TL23: Rejecting the TL13 design, the group redesigned a highly versatile assault weapon with high compatibility and excellent performance that was widely recognized by the group's mercenaries.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Supported accessories: Vertical grip, Heavy-duty extended barrel, Gun chip ‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_TL23_Pro: Building on the TL-23's excellent expandability, the gun body structure has been further upgraded, placing it among the top weapons in the group.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Supported accessories: Vertical grip, Heavy-duty extended barrel, Gun chip ‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.Gatlingun_TL: Tera Research's new Gatling gun uses special batteries to fire lasers. It has an extremely fast rate of fire, a 400-round magazine capacity, and can inflict additional damage on non-human targets. If the target is a skin-changing creature, the damage will be even higher. The magazine is rechargeable.
infotexts.entitydescription.HX_MR: Developed by Phantom Star Industries, this high-speed electromagnetic weapon propels a specially designed flying blade with extremely high kinetic energy. Throw away those plastic toys you have in your hands—this is your ultimate weapon.
infotexts.entitydescription.MR_magazine: The bullets, made from the group's proprietary alloy, can easily tear through any creature's armor and directly shred their internal organs.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: High Damage: High Ammo Capacity: 10 Can penetrate 3 layers of ship hull‖end‖
infotexts.entityname.MR_magazine_radiation: Extinction Blade Electromagnetic Magazine · Radiant Light
infotexts.entitydescription.MR_magazine_radiation: The flying blade structure has been redesigned so that when it enters the enemy's body, it bursts into countless radiating beads. They say it tastes sweet. Do you dare to lick it and try it?\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: High Damage: High Ammo Capacity: 10 Can penetrate 3 layers of ship hull‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.HX_coordinator: The first weapon developed by Phantom Star Group is a handy weapon for the early to mid-game.
infotexts.entitydescription.coordinator_magazine: A drum used by coordinators, which can also be used by pythons.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: Weak Damage: Medium-high Ammo capacity: 50‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.coordinator_magazine2: Magazine for coordinators\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: Weak Damage: Medium-high Ammo capacity: 40‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.HX_Snakes: The Phantom Star, developed in line with the TL-15 rapid-fire rifle, boasts a futuristic design. What lies beneath its sci-fi exterior?
infotexts.entitydescription.HX_Snakes_magazine: Magazine for use with a python\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: High Damage: High Ammo Capacity: 50‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.HX_competitor: A weapon engraved with strange symbols, with the Phantom Star logo engraved in an inconspicuous place, feels very heavy when held in the hand.\n‖color:gui.orange‖It is said to have been found in a leopard's den.‖end‖
infotexts.entityname.HX_competitor_ammo_AP: Hand Cannon/Competitor Bullet - Heavy Spiral Armor-Piercing Projectile
infotexts.entitydescription.HX_competitor_ammo_AP: The universal heavy handgun cartridge boasts high destructive power and a hefty price tag.
infotexts.entitydescription.HX_competitor_ammo_Hea: A uniquely shaped bullet that explodes inside the skull after penetrating the head.\n‖color:gui.orange‖A direct hit to the head will instantly kill, but only if the opponent has a head.‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.HX_competitor_ammo_dea: ‖color:purple‖生无归路心如纸\n血落尘中葬我名‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.NIL_BurstGun: ‖color:gui.orange‖Super Earth Weapon‖end‖\nThe prototype developed by Terra Tech Group's Weapons Division stands as one of the finest achievements from its mechanical design department. Utilizing large-caliber rapid-fire cannon shells, it has successfully mitigated recoil to a level tolerable for human operators. However, significant propellant gas leakage occurs during operation, rendering it strictly prohibited for use by personnel without specialized training.
infotexts.entitydescription.NIL_BurstGun_magazine: ‖color:gui.orange‖Super Earth Weapon‖end‖\nBlast Gun Traditional Magazine Holds 5 rounds of anti-aircraft high-explosive ammunition Features lightweight high-strength alloy construction for reduced weight
infotexts.entitydescription.NIL_BurstGun_HEAT_maga: ‖color:gui.orange‖Super Earth Weapon‖end‖\nBased on the high-explosive shells for the Burst Gun, the CR-9 red-gray explosive was adopted to achieve enhanced blast capability and penetration damage.
infotexts.entitydescription.NIL_BurstGun_HEAT_TIME: ‖color:gui.orange‖Super Earth Weapon‖end‖\nFitting burst-firing armor-piercing rounds with delayed-action fuses enables them to detonate 0.25 seconds after impact, delivering optimal effectiveness against enemies concealed behind cover or doors.
infotexts.entitydescription.NIL_BambooSpear: ‖color:gui.orange‖Super Earth Weapon‖end‖\nTerra Group's next-generation multi-purpose projectile launcher employs an elastic energy storage principle to fire subsonic high-quality ammunition, partially replacing the grenade launchers that perform poorly on Europa.
infotexts.entityname.TL_RedAcidSpear: Spear gun Ammunition - Red Acid Mao
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_RedAcidSpear: ‖color:gui.orange‖Super Earth Weapon‖end‖\nEquipped with a hydrogen fluoride warhead featuring a contact detonator, it ruptures upon impact with the target, releasing a massive cloud of corrosive acid.
infotexts.entityname.TL_RedAcidSpear_B: Spear gun Ammunition - Red Acid Mao (Injection Version)
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_RedAcidSpear_B: ‖color:gui.orange‖Super Earth Weapon‖end‖\nThe warhead has been modified into a specialized injection device requiring special materials to resist corrosion. Upon striking an enemy, it directly injects concentrated acid into their body, completely incinerating them into an empty shell.
infotexts.entityname.TL_RedAcidSpear_C: Spear gun Ammunition - Sulfuric Acid Mao (Injection Version)
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_RedAcidSpear_C: ‖color:gui.orange‖Super Earth Weapon‖end‖\nThe warhead was modified to a specially formulated syringe, with its internal solution replaced by ordinary concentrated sulfuric acid, thereby reducing production costs.
infotexts.entitydescription.NIL_Ultimatum: ‖color:gui.orange‖Super Earth Weapon‖end‖\nTerra Tech Group Department's experimental individual light weapon prototype, featuring an oversized caliber projectile design, is an exceptional tool for individual anti-armor combat—at least that was the original intent. This is the final ultimatum to the enemy, and to you.
infotexts.entitydescription.NIL_Ultimatum_Ammo: ‖color:gui.orange‖Super Earth Weapon‖end‖\nThe palm-sized warhead was packed to the brim with a full box of CR-9 red-gray explosive, resulting in a top-heavy design that caused severe plummeting. While delivering devastating explosions to the enemy, it also issued a final warning to the user.
infotexts.entitydescription.Nil_AT4: Pre-loaded disposable weapons discarded after firing, equipped with modified armor-piercing explosive rounds. Blueprints from the Earth era. Due to their simple structure, all factions on Europa can mass-produce and modify them. ‖color:gui.orange‖Armor-piercing explosive round: Capable of penetrating one layer of hull armor.‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.AT4Ammo_TL: If you've picked up this thing, it means there's a bug. Please take it and dismantle it.
infotexts.entitydescription.Nil_AKE: The best choice for early-stage standard weapons
infotexts.entitydescription.AKE_magazine: AKE magazine\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: Weak Damage: Low Ammo Capacity: 30‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.AKE_Magazines2: AKE drum\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: Weak Damage: Low Ammo Capacity: 65‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.M2_Magazine: The severely aged ammunition, with rust-stained shells full of stories from the past, is not suitable for suppression. It's good enough if it can be fired.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: Weak Damage: Low Ammo Capacity: 200‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.M2_Magazine_ap: A whole box of brand-new custom armor-piercing ammunition, with extended ammunition belts. The silver-blue bullets glistened with a cold metallic sheen in the dim light.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: High Damage: High Ammo Capacity: 300‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_shotgunammo_ordinar: The standard shotgun shells used by the group have weak armor-piercing capabilities but higher convergence and flesh damage, making them suitable for most shotguns.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: Weak Damage: High‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_shotgunammo_fire: Shotgun shells specifically designed for Terra Group, containing highly flammable materials that explode upon impact with the target.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: Weak Damage: Low Special Effect: Explosion‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_shotgunammo_burst: Upgraded from conventional ammunition, it is equipped with a micro-explosive warhead and is a good alternative to conventional shotgun ammunition.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: Weak Damage: Medium‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_shotgunammo_disinte: One of the products of the group's collaboration with Phantom Star Darkness, it tears apart the enemy's DNA/cells after rushing into their bodies, dismantling their defenses.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Penetration: High Damage: High Special Effect: Disintegration‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_ammobox: The intelligent ammunition box developed by Terra Group can automatically recognize the identifiers on Terra magazines and fill them with corresponding bullets through 3D printing, with a total of 1,250 units of material (80 units consumed each time, can be loaded into non-powered weapons).\n‖color:gui.orange‖[Insert magazine, right-click + left-click, press magazine]‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.HX_ammobox: Teral supplies Phantasia with smart ammunition boxes that can automatically recognize the identifiers on Phantasia's magazines and fill them with corresponding bullets via 3D printing. There are a total of 1,250 units of material (70 units are consumed each time, and can be loaded into non-faction weapons).\n‖color:gui.orange‖[Insert magazine, right-click + left-click, press magazine]‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_Tholographic_sight: Provides a 1x holographic sight\n‖color:gui.orange‖(-35% spread, +10% movement speed)‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_T2x_sight: Provides 2x magnification sights, allowing shooters to hit vital targets more easily.\n‖color:gui.orange‖(-45% spread, -5% movement speed)‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_T3x_sight: The 3x scope provides better accuracy, allowing for more precise aiming, but it does slow you down.\n‖color:gui.orange‖(-60% spread, -20% movement speed)‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_Tspreadflashlight: A flashlight that illuminates the entire room
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_Tvertical_grip: The vertical grip allows the shooter to grip the firearm more securely, improving weapon performance.\n‖color:gui.orange‖(-50% water flow impact, -35% weapon spread)‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_Tcorner_grip: Provides a more comfortable shooting posture\n‖color:gui.orange‖(+15% movement speed, +25 weapon handling)‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_Textended_barrel_li: Extended barrel attachments can increase base damage.\n‖color:gui.orange‖(+12% damage, -15% spread)‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_Textended_barrel: Extended barrel attachments can increase base damage.\n‖color:gui.orange‖(+20% damage, -18% spread)‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_WeaponChips_Thermal: Can hold firearms and armor, and activate thermal imaging module.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_WeaponChips_medical: Can be equipped with firearms and armor, and has a medical module.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_WeaponChips_balance: Can be installed on certain firearms, Terra Group's first-generation combat chip, which can effectively regulate firearm performance and unleash extraordinary combat power.\n‖color:gui.orange‖+25% movement speed, +20% damage, +25% reload speed, -20% spread‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_WeaponChips_attack: The extremely advanced chips developed by the group are often distributed to mercenaries on a one-time basis.\n‖color:gui.orange‖+50% movement speed, +35% damage, +20% reload speed, -50% spread, -50% maximum health, -99% health regeneration speed, all skills -90 except weapons, weapon skills increased to 250.‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.Throwables_Grenade_Clo: The device is internally equipped with Terra Group's displacement sensors and friend-or-foe identification modules. It detonates upon approaching enemies within a certain range. Due to the sensor components, internal space is reduced, resulting in decreased explosive charge capacity. \n ‖color:red‖Danger: When not contained, the displacement sensor actively monitors approaching enemies (in other words, if you drop it on the ground, it becomes a landmine)‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_Remotestrikemarker: Remotely call for standard missile support from the Terra Escort Ship, with a total of 20 fire coverings. Placing depth charges and other containers is ineffective.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_RemotestrikemarkerB: Remotely call in a tactical nuclear bomb from the Ark Group for a precision strike. Please stay as far away from the marked area as possible. Depositing deep-water bombs or other containers is ineffective.
infotexts.entitydescription.blindbox_TL_Remotestri: 1% chance to obtain a strategic marker, 99% chance to obtain a normal marker.
infotexts.entitydescription.Throwables_Grenade: No structural damage, just shove it up your teammate's ass.
infotexts.entitydescription.Throwables_firecracker: A toy from Earth's era. Pop a couple after this tour to celebrate—if your captain permits. This box contains 6 firecrackers, which can also trigger traps.
Deals minimal damage with a small area of effect. Can be used to trigger traps
infotexts.entitydescription.Throwables_bacteriaBro: No structural damage, designed specifically for removing the thalamus
infotexts.entitydescription.redspider: ‖color:red‖地狱之花，生于忘川，盛于忘川‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.Yedris_1: A small, elegant chip bearing the Terra logo and the words “Yedris.”
infotexts.entitydescription.Yedris_2: The technology has already been publicly disclosed by the group, featuring an EMP warhead and a fragmentation warhead, but it is evident that a crucial component is missing.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_mediumBag: Military-grade medium-sized backpack, sturdy but slightly expensive, with 16 compartments, capable of holding weapons, and a compartment specifically designed for storing diving gear.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_bigBag: Large backpack, very large but more expensive, 25 slots, can hold weapons, and has a slot for a diving suit.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_biggestBag: Extra-large backpack，Practical, expensive, can hold everything
infotexts.entitydescription.TLbagzhe: Extra-large backpack，Practical, expensive, can hold everything
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_HurugeeShield: A cheap one-handed shield that allows you to elbow enemies while running.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_HurugeeShield_B: Heavy one-handed shield; can elbow enemies while moving.
infotexts.entityname.MoldingPrinters: Tera Shaping Printer_AD-1 Fleet Standard Type
infotexts.entitydescription.MoldingPrinters: The standard model printer used by the Terra Fleet. Its operating principle is unknown, but it appears to use some kind of technology to simulate plastic materials into the actual materials needed to manufacture items.\n‖color:gui.orange‖The first slot on the lower left is for printing consumables, and the second slot is for the authenticator.‖end‖
infotexts.Lightweight_Antioxidant: Lightweight, antioxidant materials can form high-performance alloys with aluminum.
infotexts.entitydescription.Stabilizers_DNT: Essential for high-grade military propellants, ultra-long service life
infotexts.entitydescription.Triple_BasePropellant: High energy, low smoke, stable, specifically designed for heavy naval artillery weapon propellants.
infotexts.entitydescription.Triple_BasePropellant_: Upgraded from ordinary propellant, this propellant is extremely unstable. Please store it properly.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_EngineeringPlastics: A special composite plastic used by the group, which is versatile and highly reusable.
infotexts.entitydescription.PrintingMaterials: Essential consumables for group printer operation, which can be made using cheaper materials in the printer.
infotexts.entitydescription.Steel_TL: The high-hardness alloy used by the group is often used to make high-end weapons and accessories.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_Keys: Unlock the printer's access to certain blueprints, and repeatedly overwrite their contents after inserting the printer.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_blueprint: Important materials for crafting high-level equipment
infotexts.entitydescription.Radiation_ball: The radioactive core dug out of the radioactive worm's corpse—damn, this thing is hot to the touch!\n‖color:gui.orange‖Can be loaded into a creation transport box‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.nanogel: Through research on materials from the Europa ruins, the group created this precious nanomaterial with biological properties.
infotexts.entitydescription.nanogel_cr: Through reprogramming and secondary processing of the gel, this type of gel has become hazardous and can cause permanent cell death in living organisms.
infotexts.entitydescription.HighEnergyC4: The new product developed by Terra Tech Group's Chemical Division is a specialized substance obtained through centrifugal separation of reaction products from two extraterrestrial minerals: phlogiston and fulminate. The specific production process remains highly confidential. Due to its exceptional performance, Terra Tech Group has designated this series as the CR Series to avoid confusion with the conventional C Series explosives and the IC Series phlogiston explosives. ‖color:gui.red‖Danger: Please note: Store this explosive properly. Failure to do so will result in consequences at your own risk.‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.sulphuricacid_Pro: A highly corrosive strong acid produced through a specialized process, requiring special containers for storage.
infotexts.entitydescription.weldingtoolPRO1: The Group's first generation of low-end welding machines
infotexts.entitydescription.weldingtoolPRO2: The Group's second-generation standard welding machine
infotexts.entitydescription.weldingtoolPRO3: The final form of the Terra series welding machine
infotexts.entitydescription.plasmacutterPRO2: The Group's second-generation standard cutting machine
infotexts.entitydescription.plasmacutterPRO3: The final form of the Terra series cutter
infotexts.entitydescription.FireBoom_TL: An experimental jet aircraft, the high-temperature flames have the additional effect of repairing the hull.
infotexts.entitydescription.Jetaircraftfuel_tanks: Using special compression technology, a large amount of gas is compressed into this small bottle.
infotexts.entitydescription.cratedeconstructormini: You can carry it with you and quickly open the Terra supply box.
infotexts.entitydescription.REalcellruin: Expensive cell regeneration drugs supplied by the Group's department
infotexts.entitydescription.last: ‖color:gui.red‖The remnants of the body rival the gods!‖end‖\nSignificantly increases health points. If injected when at full health, maximum health points can be increased to 10,000 for 15 seconds.\n注：The higher the blood volume, the lower the damage taken.
infotexts.entitydescription.Physiotherapydevice: Install the battery and wear it on your body to slowly recover from some basic injuries.
infotexts.entitydescription.medicalkit_TL_Slow: A first aid kit that can treat all kinds of surgical wounds. It's slow to work, but it lasts a long time.
infotexts.entitydescription.stabilozineTL_Pro: Purely potent therapeutic concentrate, developed and tested by Terra Group's medical division, stands as a rare stable and non-toxic medication within the Terra pharmaceutical line. ‖color:gui.orange‖Enhanced viral suppression with hangover relief/paralysis treatment effects‖end‖\n‖color:gui.orange‖Dynamic neural trauma compatibility: Delivers 100 points of Vitamin B1, treats various visceral/bone injuries, heals up to 50 points of neural trauma‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.antibioticsTL_Pro: A more potent and less harmful concentrated antibiotic developed and tested by Terra Group's medical division. Demonstrated extreme reactivity during human trials, requiring administration by experienced physicians to avoid physical harm several times more severe otherwise. ‖color:gui.orange‖Suppresses skin infection rates below 98%, offering enhanced resistance and suppression capabilities. Poses minimal risk to human subjects upon successful skill verification‖end‖\n‖color:gui.orange‖Dynamically adapts to neural trauma: treats 100 points of sepsis‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_sprayer: A type of emergency medical supplies developed by the group needs to be loaded with a Terra medical chip to be used. It can adjust the corresponding liquid spray according to the severity of the patient's pain.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_sprayer_cheap: A widely acclaimed emergency medical supply across all factions, featuring a specially formulated solution contained within a disposable pressure canister. When treating critically injured casualties, it's certainly better than breaking their ribs...
infotexts.entitydescription.plywood: Quick and effective fracture treatment without the need for complicated fracture medical procedures.\n‖color:gui.orange‖Dynamically compatible with neural trauma; this item is ineffective if neural trauma is not loaded.‖end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.BurnOintment: A common burn ointment that provides continuous treatment for burns. Apply some before the electrician begins work.
infotexts.afflictionname.TL_acidburn: Burns from highly concentrated acid solutions
infotexts.afflictiondescription.plasmaCauterizatio: Severe burn scars cover your body, with blue-tinged electric currents swirling around them, making your entire body feel numb.
Severe burn scars covered his body, with blue-tinged electrical currents swirling around them. Touching them sent a tingling sensation through his entire body.
You have extensive burns over most of your body—there's no good flesh left. Your body has been completely fried by the electric current.
Screw this idiot—he'll get burned alive in a minute!!
infotexts.afflictiondescription.alcellruin: Some of your cells have permanently lost their activity and become more fragile.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.kill_notreal: Murder! (Loss of health points, recovers over time)
infotexts.afflictiondescription.bingdu_TL: A type that only assimilates with host cells and does not actively spread. The host does not die immediately before systemic infection, but it has a significant negative impact on the host. Perhaps a universal antidote could be effective in treating it. Each layer of the virus reduces its maximum health, and there is a chance of transmission after reaching full health or death.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.stabilozineeffectT: This drug significantly suppresses the virus in your body.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.BurnOintment_ointm: Apply burn ointment to the limb and ensure that this limb does not get roasted.
infotexts.entitydescription.GTX690: The tactical graphics card lives up to its reputation.
infotexts.entitydescription.huaqiangKnife_Genuine: You're deliberately picking a fight, aren't you?
infotexts.entitydescription.idcardplus: The Group gives you a pass to Europa.
infotexts.entitydescription.zhiheldterminal: The last record before the central computer here shut down. If you see this, it means something has happened here and it has been abandoned and erased by the group.
infotexts.entitydescription.shenyingge3: Stop arguing, okay? Just spray it.
infotexts.entitydescription.probed: Internally integrated all of the group's technologies in the medical field
infotexts.entitydescription.weldingfueltankhelf2: Right-click + E to place, can replenish various fuels
infotexts.entitydescription.allhelf: Integrated with multiple charging systems, it can charge any battery and welding oil.
infotexts.entitydescription.handheldstatusmonitorP: Interoperability with submarine systems: everything you need to know
infotexts.entitydescription.FireSprinklers: It can extinguish flames and also irrigate plants.
infotexts.entitydescription.TLskillbookeuropanmedi: A collection of medical knowledge published by the group, suitable for all ages, providing a 20-point bonus to medical skills.
infotexts.entitydescription.Shuishengseed_TL: The group uses hybrid technology to cultivate special seeds that are said to produce a variety of plants.
infotexts.entitydescription.Compositefruit: Obtained from the fruit of composite plant seeds, it is a material
infotexts.entitydescription.Powerbattery: A heavy-duty battery developed by the group that can be repeatedly charged and discharged.
infotexts.entitydescription.cleantool_TL: The ultimate means of physically eliminating experimental defense robots. Use this when you feel that you are unable to kill the experimental defense robot (only effective against it). It will directly remove the target, and you will not be able to obtain the key to the final reward.
infotexts.entitydescription.Idcard_TLnengyuanzhan: Obtained after killing experimental robots, used to unlock additional reward rooms. Limited time only, don't wait until it disappears!
infotexts.entitydescription.blindbox_TL_CDWGG: Open to have a chance to obtain Terra's precious supplies.
infotexts.entitydescription.riotshield_TL: It has a more stable structure and higher durability.
infotexts.entitydescription.periscope2: A periscope with a button and a selection box can help submarine engineers build more amazing systems (for example, connecting the chaff launch system to the selection box is a good choice).
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_divingsuitlocker2: Connecting to a power source can oxygenate many diving suits.
infotexts.entitydescription.TL_metalcrate: Large container capable of holding a significant amount of cargo for transportation.
infotexts.entityname.ResourceMaterialsRecycle: Resource MaterialsRecycle（English translation is not yet complete.）
infotexts.entitydescription.ResourceMaterialsRecyc: Recycle redundant or unused materials, convert them into gold coins, and exchange them for resources.
infotexts.entitydescription.InstructionManual: How to use the recycling machine is explained here.
infotexts.entitydescription.waiguge1: The first generation of test exoskeletons developed by the group has powerful armor, can be equipped with batteries to increase mobility, can carry a variety of items, and is self-sufficient in oxygen.
infotexts.entitydescription.exosuitCrane: Tera Regular Security Exoskeleton, with excellent survivability
infotexts.entitydescription.sp01: The prototype all-terrain special operations suit, secretly developed by Phantom Star Industries and Terra Group, features a self-contained oxygen system and a self-injecting healing system. It offers robust protective performance without compromising mobility. When a power battery is inserted, the intelligent assistance system enhances the user's overall capabilities and activates thermal imaging and health scanning functions.
infotexts.jobdescription.TLsafe: The Group's Special Forces are a special unit that has undergone special training by the Group. They possess combat capabilities that exceed those of ordinary people and are undoubtedly the strongest security force available.
infotexts.talentdescription.BeginofTLsafe: From now on, you are a member of the special forces team, and the group will provide you with certain support.：‖color:gui.green‖20‖end‖% Experience Bonus。
infotexts.talentdescription.fightTrain: Gain [amount2] experience points, [amount3] weapon skill points, and [amount4] maximum health points by killing [amount1] enemies.
infotexts.talentdescription.repairTrain: Repair [amount1] various mechanical and electrical devices to gain [amount3] experience points, [amount1] mechanical and electrical skill points, and a [amount2]% repair speed bonus.
infotexts.talentdescription.yiliaoTrain: By crafting [amount1] medical items, you will gain [amount2] experience points, [amount3] medical skill points, and [amount4]% medical effect enhancement.
infotexts.talentdescription.DuoshouTrain: You have earned [amount] driving skill points.
infotexts.talentdescription.affiliation2: The rate at which reputation within a faction increases is boosted by [amount]%. When completing tasks for your faction, the points earned are increased by [amount2]%. Note: Reputation is highest within your faction, and identical skills cannot be stacked.
infotexts.talentdescription.TL_Disposable_medical: Obtain authorization for some group disposable medical supply formulas, as well as cheaper versions, to enhance submarine medical efficiency and unlock ‖color:gui.orange‖Terra Disposable Medical Spray‖end‖
infotexts.talentname.TL_HellDive: The rogue pig is here to reinforce!!
infotexts.talentdescription.TL_HellDive: For the Super Balloon!! The Pig-Headed Desperados gave us their tech and blueprints—all for the Super Balloon! !\nUnlock‖color:gui.orange‖Blast Gun/Three Blast Gun Ammo‖end‖AND‖color:gui.orange‖Ultimatum‖end‖AND‖color:gui.orange‖Mao Gun/Three Mao Gun Ammo‖end‖
infotexts.talentdescription.systemoverload: Unlock ‖color:gui.orange‖Printer‖end‖, the real Terra has just begun, ‖color:gui.orange‖Workbench/Deconstructor/Printer‖end‖ efficiency increased by [amount]%.
infotexts.talentdescription.scavenger2: Unlock ‖color:gui.orange‖Resource Recycling Device‖end‖，Searching sunken ship containers has a [amount]% chance of finding an additional ‖color:gui.orange‖ steel bar/titanium alloy/Terra Group alloy/data blueprint‖end‖
infotexts.talentdescription.tooloverload: Your mining and repair speed will increase by [amount]%，Unlock‖color:gui.orange‖Phase II Tools‖end‖
infotexts.talentdescription.Deconstructer: Every time you dismantle an item, there is a [amount]% chance of obtaining triple the yield.
infotexts.talentdescription.gongyi: Crafting items increases [amount] quality and unlocks ‖color:gui.orange‖three-stage tools‖end‖ and ‖color:gui.orange‖medical/thermal imaging chips‖end‖.
infotexts.talentdescription.drsubmarinePRO: Your medical crafting speed is increased by [amount]%, and your medical skill is increased by [amount2].
infotexts.talentdescription.miracleworkerPRO: You and your teammates within 4 meters of you will not die.
infotexts.talentdescription.drsubmarinePRO2: When you complete any task, you will receive [amount] Group Medical Operation Manuals, [amount2] blood bags, and [amount] Dawn and Dusk.‖color:gui.orange‖Unlocking Dawn‖end‖And‖color:gui.orange‖medical chip‖end‖And‖color:gui.orange‖Tera Medical Spray‖end‖
infotexts.talentdescription.Shuigui_TL: After completing the group's customized training program, your swimming speed has improved by [amount]% and your land movement speed has improved by [amount2]%.Unlock‖color:gui.orange‖AT4 Anti-Tank Sub-Launched Rocket Launcher Cheap Recipe‖end‖
infotexts.talentdescription.hurt_TL: Your skin and bones have undergone group skin enhancement surgery, increasing your physical resistance by [amount]% and burn resistance by [amount]%. You have unlocked the ‖color:gui.orange‖TL-14 Standard Assault Rifle·Modified‖end‖ and the ‖color:gui.orange‖TL-15 Assault Rifle‖end‖.
infotexts.talentdescription.advancedattack: After completing the group's special operations training course, you have gained a deeper understanding of Terra weapons. Your movement speed is reduced by [amount]%, and the damage dealt by Terra weapon ammunition is increased by [amount2]%. You also unlock the ‖color:gui.orange‖TL-23 Advanced Assault Shotgun‖end‖ and the ‖color:gui.orange‖TL-15 Assault Rifle· Modified‖end‖, as well as the ‖color:gui.orange‖Weapon Balance Chip‖end‖.
infotexts.talentdescription.lastfight: You are already an elite special forces operative within the Group. The Group will do everything possible to ensure your safety. You may call for individual support and remote strategic strikes. Upon completing all missions, you will receive a Strike Indicator Crate, with a chance to obtain two types of Markers: \nIncrease maximum health by [amount], increase damage equivalent to [amount]% of weapon proficiency, unlock ‖color:gui.orange‖ Blade Extinction‖end‖ and ‖color:gui.orange‖Ultimate Weapon - Baikal Blue Ice‖end‖, along with ‖color:gui.orange‖Firearm Assault Chip‖end‖
infotexts.locationnameformat.TLEnergyTowers_1: TerraTech Abandoned Facility - Energy Harvesting Station - Low Difficulty
infotexts.locationname.TLEnergyTowers_1: Energy Station, one of the key facilities supplying primary energy to Terra Group, relies on laser mining technology to excavate precious resources deep beneath Europa's rocky surface. Though the facility appears long abandoned, emergency power sources still barely sustain some systems.\n（This copy is a difficulty-reduced version featuring fewer traps and fewer enemy waves, allowing players to better acclimate to this map.）
infotexts.locationnameformat.TLEnergyTowers: TerraTech Abandoned Facility - Energy Harvesting Station - Standard Difficulty
infotexts.locationname.TLEnergyTowers: Energy stations, one of the key facilities supplying primary energy to Terra Group, rely on laser mining technology to excavate precious resources deep beneath the icy walls of Europa.\n The facility appears to have been abandoned for quite some time, yet it still clings to life with emergency power barely sustaining some systems.
infotexts.locationname.DMissions: Terra Group The alliance's specialized spy outposts for containment and surveillance are currently under attack from the Phantom Star's massive Normandy-style assault.
infotexts.locationnameformat.TLxue: Terra Technology Research Facility - Viewing Snow-Capped Mountains Together
infotexts.locationname.TLxue: The origin of the flower of the afterlife, Terra's top-secret research facility
infotexts.locationnameformat.TLHQ: Phantom Star Research Facility - Iron Tree in Bloom
infotexts.locationname.TLHQ: 铁树一朝开血花，寒心不忘旧年刃
infotexts.locationname.TLMine: The group's former mining site has long been abandoned, and there are still many minerals left behind.
infotexts.orderdialog.restandrecover: [name], you should rest in bed right now!
infotexts.orderdialogself.restandrecover: I'll rest for a time being.
infotexts.orderdialog.dismissed.restandrecover: [name]，Get up and get to work! Or I'll make sure you can't get out of bed for a week!
infotexts.ordername.restandrecover_B: Lie down on the advanced treatment bed！
infotexts.orderdialog.restandrecover_B: [name], Hurry to the advanced treatment bed for your treatment.！
Your condition is very unstable.！[name],Hurry to the advanced treatment bed for your treatment.！
infotexts.orderdialogself.restandrecover_B: You're all set now. Go ahead and let someone else have a turn.
infotexts.orderdialog.dismissed.restandrecover_B: [name]，Your injuries have healed, and you are ready to be discharged.
infotexts.itemmsgweldingfuelrequiredorJetaircraftf: Welding oil or jet high-pressure fuel tank required
infotexts.fabricationheader.1130box: Terra Close-In Weapon System Spare Ammunition Box
infotexts.fabricationdescription.1130box: Terra Close-In Weapon System (CIWS) Spare Ammunition Boxes, Durability Requirement: 0-90%
infotexts.fabricationheader.LaserCloseSystem_ammob: Empty Ammunition Box for Heavy Laser Defense System
infotexts.fabricationdescription.LaserCloseSystem_: Empty Ammunition Box for Heavy Laser Defense System
infotexts.fabricationheader.LaserCloseSystem_Heavy: Energy-Focused Air Ammunition Pod for Heavy Laser Defense Systems
infotexts.fabricationdescription.LaserCloseSystem_: Only energy-focused blank ammunition boxes may be used for reloading.
infotexts.faction.TLCompany.description: A newly emerging tech company on Europa, it wields powerful technological capabilities but has a small workforce. Most of its facilities and armaments are controlled by artificial intelligence, and its relationship with the Alliance is somewhat strained. According to unreliable reports, it is supporting some illegal activities and separatist forces.
infotexts.faction.TLCompany.shortdescription: A neutral technology company with the strength of advanced technology support and the rigor of artificial intelligence decision-making. Most of its facilities and weapons are controlled by artificial intelligence, and its relationship with the alliance is somewhat strained. According to unreliable sources, it is supporting some illegal activities and separatist forces.
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.XIGUAN.GetMissions.1: Hello, I am a straw from Terra Group. How can I help you?
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.XIGUAN.GetMissions.2: Are there any tasks available? I've been spending a lot on Red Romance lately and am a bit short on cash.
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.XIGUAN.GetMissions.3: Sure, no problem. Do you need any help from the group?
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.XIGUAN.GetMissions.4: Of course you need it. Who wouldn't want something for free?
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.XIGUAN.GetMissions.5: (First, I checked the reputation of this fleet in the group network.) Um... well... resources are a bit tight lately... You can apply later... (OS: With such a low reputation, what supplies are you even asking for?)
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.XIGUAN.GetMissions.6: (First, I checked the reputation of this fleet on the group network.) Okay, I have requested assistance for you from the computer. Terra Technology wishes you a safe journey and good health.
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.XIGUAN.GetMissions.7: Aid? What the hell kind of aid? The only ones who need aid are those with lung fog.
infotexts.Dialogue.HX.HQ.1: Station-wide announcement: Attention! The facility is under attack! Research and logistics personnel, prepare to evacuate! Security patrol teams, prepare to engage the enemy! Rapid response teams are on their way!
infotexts.Dialogue.HX.HQ.2: The rapid response team is on the scene! Prepare to counterattack!
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.1: 看什么看，没见过帅豹吗（瞪）
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.2: 见过见过，现在就见到了
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.6: 哦嘿！我记得你，最近可还安好？
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.7: 凑合过吧，集团给的也太少了...而且还天天让我们送死啥的
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.8: 额嗯...这...木卫二谁也不容易嘛...好了好了别哭穷了，给你点行了吧...去买点好吃的...（好感+1）
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.9: 还不错呢，在泰拉的援助下最近过得蛮滋润的
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.10: 嘿嘿啊♡，是吗，加油看好你们哦（好感+2）
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.11: 又见面了，下午好啊，你们已经入了集团的眼中了哦
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.13: 嘶...你怎么上来就知道和人家要补给，脑子里只剩下物资和钱了是吧...？好了好了拿去就是了...（不耐烦）\n-可能在后续更新后续写
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.14: 是吗，那以后能不能少让我们送死？
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.15: 嗯嘛...这个我尽量，集团以后给予你们的支援逐渐会越来越大，甚至可以单兵呼叫支援哦♡
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.16: 你这家伙又在画饼是吗？
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.17: 没有没有...唉啊这个给你行了吧...
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.18: 此次航行还算顺利吗？怎么了...怎么这样看我？
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.19: 我想和你了解一下集团能源采集塔的故事...
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.20: 怎...么...能源站是集团开采木卫二资源的重要设施，坐落在整颗星球的各个角落，它们通过雇佣大量低价劳工为集团提供了重要的后勤资源...（讲话突然被玩家打断）
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.21: （打断豹的讲话）为什么我收到了清理能源站的任务，你们不是说所有的人都撤离了吗！但是那些被我们击毙的人身上有你们的工作牌！这就是你们集团对待自己员工的态度吗？你们甚至不如那些分离野人！（越讲越气愤，语气越来越犀利激动）
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.22: 不不...这一定是有什么误会在里面...（眼神闪躲，脸颊侧面有几滴不易察觉的冷汗冒了出来）那些人也许是入侵的海盗，然后捡到了我们员工在撤离时候遗失的工作牌，正好你们把他们击毙了...对对！一定是这样！
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.23: 哦是嘛，为什么在你这里有这么多巧合？那么好，那些终端日志和那些家伙的日记你怎么解释，他们甚至在你们集团的网络中已经被除名！瞧瞧那些感染脓毒的人，瞧瞧你们拿几百条人命干了什么！
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.24: 日...日记？？！怎么可能有日记？！（明显慌了神）不不不，绝对没有此事！能源站的实验都是严格保密执行的，那些人是他们自己...
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.25: （猛然抽豹一巴掌）你承认你在能源站做实验了？那几百人在你这里连畜生都不如是吗？你怎么不在自己身上扎那傻逼病毒？（把豹劈头盖脸骂一顿）
infotexts.Dialogue.TL.Leo.26: 呃...呃呜...我...（被抽宕机了，捂着脸半天说不出话）我不是那个意思...那些实验都是幻星他们...（呆呆的自顾自讲了两句，回过神发现玩家已经走远了）\n-可能在后续更新后续写
infotexts.missionsuccess.hunting: The lost ship has been sunk.
infotexts.missiondescription.mudraptors_small: We found several venomous pterosaurs roaming between [location1] and [location2]. They are affecting ship traffic. Afterward, [reward] mk reward.
infotexts.missionfailure.mudraptors_small: We will not pay for the ship's repair costs.
infotexts.text.mudraptors_small: It's easy~ Come to the outpost and get your money.
infotexts.missiondescription.mudraptors_gun: Several strange poisonous punch velociraptors were found wandering between the channels. They are really different... Please go and clean it up, and [reward] mk reward afterwards
infotexts.missionsuccess.mudraptors_gun: The armed velociraptor has been eliminated
infotexts.missionfailure.mudraptors_gun: We won't pay for the boat's repairs.
infotexts.text.mudraptors_gun: Ah, damn, does your family's raptor get hurt by gunfire?!
infotexts.missionname.TLNest1: Clearing out the nest of the venomous swift dragon
infotexts.missiondescription.TLNest1: We have detected a nest of venomous swift dragons nearby. Please go and clear it out.
infotexts.text.TLNest1: The waterways in this area have returned to silence.
infotexts.missiondescription.TLrescue1: The automatic distress system of a Phantasia Science Expedition team has been activated. Our radar detected it in advance. Please go and check if there are any survivors.
infotexts.missionsuccess.TLrescue1: Sure enough, they're just a bunch of guys who only know how to hide in their labs....
infotexts.header.TLrescue1: Sure enough, they're just a bunch of guys who only know how to hide in their labs....
infotexts.text.TLrescue1: I will report these matters. Please go to the site to collect your reward. Please treat today as if you had not been here.
infotexts.header.TLrescue2: It seems like an unexpected situation...
infotexts.text.TLrescue2: The speed of the Phantom Star is still beyond doubt...
infotexts.header.TLrescue3: It seems like an unexpected situation...
infotexts.missiondescription.TLceshiji: There was a minor hiccup in the experiment, and the remote commands are no longer effective. Please go directly to destroy these madmen. The remote coordinates have been synchronized to your terminals.
infotexts.missionsuccess.TLceshiji: The out-of-control testing machine has been cleared.
infotexts.missionfailure.TLceshiji: We will remember your efforts. It is time to dispatch the group's attack ships.
infotexts.header.TLceshiji: The test machine has been damaged.
infotexts.text.TLceshiji: The road to success for any cutting-edge technology is fraught with obstacles, and we can only tread it barefoot.
infotexts.missiondescription.RS: 风止鸟静，树影不动，日蚀遮蔽世界的双眼
infotexts.missionsuccess.RS: 日蚀散去，天地如释重负
infotexts.header.RS: 日蚀散去，天地如释重负
infotexts.text.RS: You have succeeded. The waterway remains as it was, yet it is even more tranquil.
infotexts.missiondescription.TLhunting: 别离的歌早已哼在嘴边 是你 为我 题词
infotexts.missionsuccess.TLhunting: The flickering candlelight illuminated the stars of the evening, the crew members. Congratulations!
infotexts.missionfailure.TLhunting: Sorry, crew members, you don't have enough experience yet.
infotexts.text.TLhunting: The brave warrior who fights for survival in the candlelight, you deserve our admiration.
infotexts.missiondescription.TLhaidao: (This mission is a pirate mission, so it's best to only take one mission of this type.)\nThis is extremely urgent. A frigate carrying the group's weapon of mass destruction has defected. Do not let this weapon fall into the hands of the Alliance. I don't care what methods you use, just make sure they stay at the bottom of the sea!
infotexts.header.TLhaidao: 叛逃锤头鲨级护卫舰已被击沉
infotexts.text.TLhaidao: 非常感谢，你们最好不要碰那东西，我们会派出专人来回收它
infotexts.missiondescription.Pirate: (This mission is a pirate mission, so it's best to only take one mission of this type.)\n Alliance Liaison Officer: Damn that group, always opposing us. According to the detector, an old group transport ship will pass through the route ahead. Let's show them what we're made of! You can do whatever you want with the sunken ship!
infotexts.text1.Pirate: You guys are crazy! Alliance dogs! You'll eventually be swallowed up by the group!
infotexts.header.Pirate: The old Moroccan-class transport ship has been sunk.
infotexts.text.Pirate: It's finally over. We've cut off one of their supply lines... just one...
infotexts.missiondescription.TLyiliaojian: (This mission is a pirate mission, so it's best to only take one mission of this type.)\nWe have captured the medical ship that recently lost contact while en route to the energy station. Please go and investigate.
infotexts.text.TLyiliaojian: It seems that some people want to die more than you do....
infotexts.missiondescription.TLFaultyMech: (This is a pirate mission; it's best to only accept one mission of this type at a time.) \nOne of our experimental mechs suddenly lost connection during testing. Please investigate immediately.\n This unit is equipped with our new anti-ship missiles. We cannot confirm whether they've been activated, but this model's missile sensors have a limited range. Good luck.
infotexts.header.TLFaultyMech: The unknown intruder has been eliminated.
infotexts.text.TLFaultyMech: Control of the mecha has been regained.
infotexts.missiondescription.TLEnergyTowers: Please go and clear the Group Energy Station. All employees have been evacuated. Remember that your task is to clear out all living forces. Only the front half needs to be cleared.
infotexts.text.TLEnergyTowers: The first half has already been cleaned up, and the rest has been handed over to the group. Leaving is an option; of course, you can also choose to thoroughly clean up the mining area.
infotexts.missiondescription.DMissions: This site is under attack from a wave of skin-changing creatures. Hostile life forms have been detected inside, and the automatic defense system has been overwhelmed. Please go there immediately to provide support.\nAn attack ship nearby is on standby, and the control console in the station's control room is connected to the attack ship's support system. You have full command of the ship's firepower.
infotexts.header.DMissions: Enemy life signals have disappeared, recovery protocol initiated.
infotexts.text.DMissions: The attack ship is in position, and you have full command of its firepower.
infotexts.missiondescription.TLMine: This area was once a rich mining district occupied by the Group. Although it has been abandoned for a long time, there are still some residual minerals that can be mined. Consider it a gift from the Group. Of course, there are also some unfriendly creatures here.
infotexts.text.TLMine: After the excavation is complete, you can return at any time to report back.
infotexts.missiondescription.TLxue: 雪后山间静谧多， 银装素裹映长河。 携手同行观美景， 却忆往昔泪婆娑\nOur secret research station has suddenly been attacked by an unknown fleet. Please rush to the scene immediately and provide support. Under no circumstances should they be allowed to seize the prototype of the Beyond Flower!
infotexts.text.TLxue: 寒风吹尽旧时梦， 雪落无声人独愁。 山河虽美心难静， 空对银装泪自流
infotexts.missionname.TLAbandonedOutpostMission1: The wind and snow have subsided.
infotexts.missiondescription.TLAbandonedOutpostMis: It seems that Terra has been running rampant on Europa! It's time to put an end to their arrogance! Do you want to confront the group head-on? Let them know that the Alliance is not to be trifled with! (Please detonate the reactor to complete the mission.)
infotexts.header.TLAbandonedOutpostMission1: 岁寒过后终见暖，人生如斯自有情...
infotexts.text.TLAbandonedOutpostMission1: 风雪消霁天地清， 梅花点点映寒冰。 遥望山川银装褪， 心随冬去盼春明
infotexts.missiondescription.TLHQToweroutpost: You want to take the prototype of the Beyond Flower from the Group? Fine, let's see if this bunch of old, weak, and disabled people from Phantom Star have the strength to do so. (Please detonate the reactor to complete the mission.)
infotexts.header.TLHQToweroutpost: The Phantom Star Squad has been eliminated, and the reactor has been destroyed!
infotexts.text.TLHQToweroutpost: Keep fighting! Avenge your defeat! From the moment you entered “Cherry,” our revenge was destined to succeed. You can retreat now! Of course, you can also pull out all their teeth and clear this place!
infotexts.missiondescription.Cargo1_TL: The Group will provide support to every loyal fleet. Please promptly receive supplies in the cargo hold.
infotexts.missiondescription.Escort1_TL: The Group is willing to provide escort services during this voyage.
